name: browser.startup.page
description: What to show when the browser starts (0=blank, 1=home, 2=last session, 3=restore session).

name: browser.startup.homepage
description: Home page URL when using a custom home page.

name: browser.search.region
description: Region used for search engine defaults.

name: browser.search.suggest.enabled
description: Enable search suggestions in the address bar.

name: browser.urlbar.trimURLs
description: Hide https:// and www in the address bar.

name: browser.tabs.loadInBackground
description: Whether new tabs load in the background.

name: browser.tabs.warnOnClose
description: Warn when closing a window with multiple tabs.

name: privacy.trackingprotection.enabled
description: Enable Enhanced Tracking Protection in standard windows.

name: privacy.trackingprotection.enabled.pbmode
description: Enhanced Tracking Protection in private windows.

name: media.ffmpeg.vaapi.enabled
description: Hardware video decode via VA-API on Linux (when supported).

name: general.useragent.override
description: Override the global User-Agent string (empty = default).

name: browser.aboutConfig.showWarning
description: Show the warning when opening about:config.
